cit.basis: Standard 22% corporate income tax (PPh Badan) under UU HPP (Law No. 7 of 2021 on Harmonisation of Tax Regulations); publicly listed companies meeting the 40%-free-float conditions get a 3-percentage-point reduction to 19%.

small_business_final_tax.note: 0.5% FINAL tax on TURNOVER (gross revenue, not profit) for small businesses with annual gross turnover ≤ IDR 4.8bn (PP 55/2022). Different tax base — out of scope for this CIT-on-profit estimator; note-only.

art_31e_facility.note: Art. 31E: 50% rate discount on the first IDR 4.8bn slice of taxable income for companies with gross turnover ≤ IDR 50bn. Note-only — not modelled in cit.py.

cit.note: Administered by the Direktorat Jenderal Pajak (DJP). Sector-specific final-tax regimes (construction, shipping, etc.) are out of scope.

wht.note: 20% withholding tax on dividends paid to foreign (non-resident) shareholders (Art. 26), subject to reduction under applicable tax treaties (treaty relief via DGT form).

vat.note: PPN (VAT) 11% under UU HPP. The statutory 12% rate effective 1 Jan 2025 applies to LUXURY goods only; for most goods and services the effective rate remains 11% via the DPP (tax base) adjustment of 11/12.

personal_income_tax.note: Progressive personal income tax (PPh 21) from 5% to 35% across five brackets (UU HPP).

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Small-business final-tax regime, Art. 31E facility, sector final taxes, WHT, relief, filing, and treaty rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
